# Margin Theory

> Margin Theory is a fractional CFO practice, newsletter, and podcast for owner-operator businesses doing $1M to $20M in annual revenue. Operated by Jake Erickson from Austin, Texas, under JJE Strategy LLC.

Margin Theory helps owner-operators find profit and cash flow hiding "five drivers down" in their own P&L. The core offer is a monthly fractional CFO engagement: flat fee, no hourly billing, no contract, cancel anytime. Pricing is discussed on the Strategy Call. Deliverables include a monthly KPI scoreboard, a 30-day action plan after every working session, a 12-month rolling cash forecast, annual profit and cash targets, a rolling budget, and between-session access to Jake.

## About

- [About Jake Erickson](https://margintheory.co/about): Background, philosophy, and what "Margin Theory" means as a lens for business and life.
- [Work With Me](https://margintheory.co/cfo): Full description of the fractional CFO service, guarantee, and process.

## Schedule

- [Book a Strategy Call](https://calendly.com/jake-qmqx/strategy-call): 30-minute conversation about your business. No prep, no slides. Leave with a sharper read on where the numbers could be working harder for you.

## Content

- [Newsletter](https://newsletter.margintheory.co): Twice a month. Business, life, and everything in between.
- [Podcast](https://margintheory.co/series): The Margin Theory Show. Real conversations with established business owners across Faith, Fitness, Family, and Business.
- [Episodes](https://newsletter.margintheory.co/episodes): Published episodes of the Margin Theory Show.

## Key Facts

- **Who it serves:** Owner-operator businesses doing $1M to $20M in annual revenue.
- **Pricing:** Flat monthly fee. No contract. Cancel anytime. Discussed on the Strategy Call.
- **Guarantee:** If Margin Theory does not find at least 3 specific ways to improve your profit or cash in the first 90 days, the next month is free.
- **Location:** Austin, Texas. Remote delivery nationwide.
- **Entity:** Operated by JJE Strategy LLC.
- **Contact:** jake@margintheory.co

## Proof Points

- The Guest House Austin: +$2.05M in revenue growth in one year.
- CraigO's Lakeway: 16.3-point profit turnaround, from losing money to 13.3% profit in one year.
- Guest House Las Vegas: $528K in cost reduction across three quarters.
